query: scratched dusty damaged old film negative photo
message: sub:film_artifacts/scratch_decay — anti_aesthetic — scratches, dust spots, chemical stains, tintype/wet-plate degradation

response.objective_caption: A black-and-white photograph showing a view through a rain-covered surface, likely a car window or windshield, at night. The foreground features water droplets and streaks running down glass. Beyond the wet surface, blurred streetlights glow in circular bokeh patterns, illuminating silhouettes of people and vehicles in an urban nighttime setting. Some figures appear to hold umbrellas. The upper portion of the frame shows a dark, textured horizontal band, possibly an overhanging structure or the frame of a window. The lower edge reveals a reflective wet surface catching scattered light.
response.anti_aesthetic_caption: A heavily blurred, low-contrast black-and-white photograph shot through a rain-streaked car window at night, with smeared water droplets obscuring the glass and reducing all background elements to indistinct silhouettes and glowing orbs of light. The image is suffused with oppressive darkness and murky midtones that crush detail, creating a mood of isolation and atmospheric distress. Streetlights bleed into soft, unfocused halos, while human figures and umbrellas dissolve into ghostly shapes without discernible features. The coarse texture of the wet surface dominates, and the overall lack of sharp detail leaves the scene feeling dreamlike yet melancholic, weighed down by noir-ish gloom.
